form.formComment: Most recently 2nd of 7 at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 2500m, 2.75 len behind Alther Walden carrying 61kg at $4.30. The start before that 2nd of 8 at Wolverhampton on February 6 over 2400m, neck behind Nolton Cross carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. One of the leading chances.

The start before that 2nd of 8 at Wolverhampton on February 6 over 2400m, neck behind Nolton Cross carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. One of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 4th in a small field at Southwell All Weather on March 4 over 2200m, 3.5 len behind Bint Al Daar carrying 61kg at $3.80. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Newmarket (July) on August 16 over 2800m, 1.75 len behind Moon Angel with 57kg at $3.80. Has ability but will need to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second of 13 at this track October 29 over 2420m, 1.75 len behind Another Run with 61kg at $4. Previously first up; third of 10 at Haydock Park April 26 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Previse carrying 58kg at $5.50. In the right race and sure to go well.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Southwell All Weather on March 4 over 2200m, 2.25 len behind Bint Al Daar with 58kg at $6. The race before that won by 2 len at this track February 11 over 2200m defeating Veraison with 61.5kg at $8. Not likely to contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inside the 3 furlong marker, moved off its intended line.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Wolverhampton October 11 over 2820m, 1.3 len behind Appier with 61kg at $5.50. Previously first up; second last of 7 at Newbury April 12 over 2200m, 9 len behind Furthur with 58kg at $19. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Filly returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign third in a small field at Southwell All Weather April 2 2025 over 2200m, 2.25 len behind Spirit Of Jura with 58kg at $3. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.3 len Southwell All Weather March 14 2025 over 2200m defeating Lady Odette carrying 56.5kg at $11. Among the hopes.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation eighth of 12 at Newbury October 24 over 2000m, soft track; 12 len behind Day Of Grace with 57.5kg at $29.
